name: Spinach and Mushroom Lasagna II
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Cook lasagna in plenty of boiling water for 8 to 10 minutes. Drain and rinse in cold water.
3. Prepare the spinach by washing it several times in cold water. Place in a heavy-bottomed pot and cook gently without adding more water, for 6 to 8 minutes. When cooked, strain off excess water and chop finely. Return to the pot and season well.
4. Put pan on gentle heat, add margarine and marjoram, stir, and then remove from heat. When the spinach has cooled, mix in the ricotta.
5. Check the seasoning of the spinach mixture.
6. Prepare the sauce: sauté sliced mushrooms in margarine until reduced, reduce heat and continue to cook for 10 minutes in a covered pot so that plenty of juice is extracted. Add vegetable stock and simmer for another 5 minutes. Puree briefly with a blender.
7. Add soy sauce and season to taste.
8. Lightly oil a square 3-pint dish. Spoon some spinach, cover with 2 or 3 pieces of lasagna, then a coat of the mushroom sauce. Repeat, ending with the mushroom sauce. Sprinkle with grated cheese.
9. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes. Serve immediately.
